task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the study with the correct Protocol ID and Titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an OpenClinica 'View Study' or 'Create Study' screen showing the Unique Protocol ID as 'PK-HV-001', Brief Title as 'Healthy Volunteer PK Study', and Official Title as 'A Phase I Single-Ascending Dose Study of InGen-04'.

task_completion.description: Verify the study details including PI, Sponsor, Enrollment, and Facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for study details in the OpenClinica interface showing Principal Investigator 'Dr. Alan Grant', Sponsor 'InGen Therapeutics', Expected Total Enrollment '40', and Facility 'InGen Clinical Unit' in Boston, MA, US.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Dosing Visit' study event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Study Event definition list or details page showing an event named 'Dosing Visit' with Type 'Scheduled', Repeating set to 'No' (or non-repeating), and Category 'Treatment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Safety Follow-up' study event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Study Event definition list or details page showing an event named 'Safety Follow-up' with Type 'Unscheduled', Repeating set to 'Yes' (or repeating), and Category 'Safety'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user 'mrivera' is assigned to the study with the correct role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user assignment or study users page in OpenClinica showing the username 'mrivera' assigned to the study 'PK-HV-001' (or 'Healthy Volunteer PK Study') with the role of 'Investigator'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OpenClinica web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica application, not terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing into OpenClinica form fields or clicking save/submit buttons, rather than just displaying a text file with the required values.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are from genuine application state and not manipulated HTML.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica UI should look consistent without browser developer tools open or obvious text overlays/inconsistencies in the styling of the study details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected study parameters are: Unique Protocol ID 'PK-HV-001', Brief Title 'Healthy Volunteer PK Study', PI 'Dr. Alan Grant', and Sponsor 'InGen Therapeutics'. Two events must be defined: 'Dosing Visit' (Scheduled, non-repeating) and 'Safety Follow-up' (Unscheduled, repeating). The user 'mrivera' must be assigned the role of 'Investigator'.
